definitions.text: avgangselev ved videregående skole (som feirer i vårmånedene)
definitions.translation: graduating student at upper secondary school (who celebrates in the spring months)

definitions.text: i bestemt form entall: alle russ i et kull (i et område, på en skole)
definitions.translation: all graduating students in a year (in an area, at a school)
examples: russen har oppført seg fint i år

definitions.text: om eldre forhold: avgangselev ved gymnas, handelsgymnas handelsgymnasium eller realskole
definitions.translation: about older conditions: graduating student from gymnasium, commercial gymnasium, or realskole

definitions.text: om eldre forhold: student i første året etter studenteksamen
definitions.translation: about older conditions: student in the first year after matriculation exam
